title: Umami Light Egyptian Baby Pak Koi Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful dish featuring tender baby pak koi in a rich umami sauce, perfect for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Baby Pak Koi
ingredients.notes: Frozen baby pak koi can be used as a substitute.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Stock (Bone Broth)
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's at least 74°C before serving to ensure safety.

instructions: Prepare the baby pak koi by thawing it if frozen, rinse under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
In a small saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add tomato paste and garlic powder, stirring for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Gradually add vegetable stock (bone broth) while whisking continuously to prevent lumps from forming. Once the mixture is smooth, reduce heat to low.
In a small bowl, mix umami compound B with soy sauce; pour into the saucepan along with water or vegetable stock, and bring to a simmer.
Add salt and pepper to taste, then gently toss in the baby pak koi until coated. Cook for about 2-3 minutes or until tender but still firm to touch.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves before serving.
